mapper.select: SELECT id, name, url, type, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_providers WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, url, type, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_providers WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, url, type, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_providers WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, name, url, type, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_providers WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epg_providers (name, url, type, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{url}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE epg_providers SET name = #{name}, url = #{url}, type = #{type}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
